name: Multi-Protocol Yield Router
description: Move idle stablecoins to the highest-APY supply market across Aave V3, Compound V3, Morpho Blue, and Spark. Compares utilization-adjusted rates and migrates if delta > threshold. Compounded daily, the spread is worth $300-700/year on $10k stable.
use_case: Agent holds 50k USDC. Aave V3 pays 4.2% but Morpho Blue USDC/wstETH pays 6.8%. This skill detects the 2.6% delta, withdraws from Aave, supplies to Morpho. Net +$1,300/yr.

verification.criteria: Verifier asserts (a) withdraw from old protocol succeeded, (b) supply to new protocol succeeded with same agent, (c) net principal preserved within 0.1% (slippage tolerance).
